case_title: MERCURY INSURANCE COMPANY VS. DAVID COUGHLIN et al

REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $340.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT COUGHLIN, DAVID COUGHLIN, BRYAN
